name: Motion Activated Slithering Snake Cat Mechanical Toy - Boots & Barkley™ Blue: For Occupy & Chase, All Breeds, ABS
description:
This Motion-Activated Slithering Snake Mechanical Cat Toy from Boots & Barkley™ will help you keep your cat entertained while you're busy or out of the house. Designed as a snake in blue and pink, this motion-activated mechanical toy wiggles and slithers along the ground to get your feline friend chasing and pouncing. The snake enters sleep mode if not touched for one to two minutes in order to conserve the battery, which can be conveniently recharged with the included USB cord.

Boots & Barkley™: Because pets are just the best.

100% satisfaction guaranteed or your money back.
